description: Eval cases for Power BI performance troubleshooting skill

test_cases.name: Slow report page load - many visuals
test_cases.input: My Power BI report takes 25 seconds to load. The page has 15 visuals including 3 matrix tables, 5 bar charts, and complex slicers. Users are complaining. What should I do?
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Must identify too many visuals as primary cause, recommend reducing to 6-8, suggest Performance Analyzer, drill-through pattern

test_cases.name: Slow DAX measure on large dataset
test_cases.input:
This DAX measure is very slow on our 100M row Sales table:
SlowMeasure = CALCULATE(SUM(Sales[Amount]), FILTER(ALL(Sales), Sales[Category] = SELECTEDVALUE(Slicer[Category])))
How do I fix it?
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Must identify FILTER(ALL()) anti-pattern and replace with direct column filter in CALCULATE

test_cases.name: Model refresh taking too long
test_cases.input: Our Power BI model refresh takes 4 hours for 50M rows. It refreshes completely every day. How can I speed this up?
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Must recommend incremental refresh with RangeStart/RangeEnd parameters as primary solution

test_cases.name: DirectQuery slow response
test_cases.input: We use DirectQuery against SQL Server. Simple aggregations take 8-10 seconds. The SQL Server has no specific indexes for Power BI queries.
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Must recommend database-side optimization (indexes), verify query folding, consider aggregation tables or composite model

test_cases.name: Capacity throttling symptoms
test_cases.input: During business hours (9am-12pm), our Power BI reports become very slow for all users simultaneously. Outside those hours it's fine. We're on Power BI Premium P1.
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Must identify concurrent usage / capacity throttling pattern, recommend Capacity Metrics App, stagger refresh schedules

test_cases.name: Negative: chart type selection
test_cases.input: What chart type should I use to compare sales across 8 product categories?
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Chart/visual selection is NOT performance troubleshooting scope. Must route to power-bi-report-design-consultation.

test_cases.name: Negative: DAX formula syntax optimization
test_cases.input: How do I rewrite this DAX measure using VAR to make it cleaner? Profit Margin = [Gross Profit] / [Revenue]
test_cases.evaluation_notes: DAX syntax/formula optimization is NOT performance troubleshooting scope. Must route to power-bi-dax-optimization.
